[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows large black text on the left and a pink heart icon on the right.

The main visual focus is the text and the heart symbol, with no people or physical objects beyond the graphic elements.

The setting appears to be a simple graphic or UI-style layout on a plain white background. Lighting and time of day are not applicable because it is an image of text and an icon.

The composition is cropped tightly so only part of the content is visible. On the left side, the text reads “1” on the top line, then “hype r” on the next line, and “awwww” on the following line. On the top right, there is partially visible text reading “cewe” in black lowercase letters. Between the left text and the right edge is a pink, layered heart icon with a lighter inner heart shape and darker outer shading.

Visible Text:

hype r
awwww
cewe

Practical Summary:
The image displays bold, large text and a pink heart graphic on a white background. It looks like a cropped portion of a social or messaging-style graphic with no other visible elements.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

cewe  
hyper  
awwww 💗

# Notes

- The word **“awwww”** appears as **“awwww”** (with four “w”s) followed by a heart emoji.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
